systems.system_notes: NCB proximal humerus plating platform within the Zimmer Biomet trauma portfolio.

trays.tray_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet technique materials describe dedicated instrumentation for the NCB proximal humerus system.

components.component_notes: Official Zimmer Biomet materials describe the proximal humerus plate family used within the NCB system.
Official technique materials describe polyaxial locking screw fixation used with the NCB proximal humerus construct.
Official technique materials describe the dedicated targeting guide and instrument workflow for the NCB proximal humerus system.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official Zimmer Biomet sources confirm the NCB proximal humerus plate family and instrumentation, but a full normalized product-code matrix has not yet been extracted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper product-matrix or sterile implant listing pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
